Let us understand the Varga Chatushtaya method with
better clarity. The statements involved are -
1) The Navamsa longitude ofLagna (Lagna longitude x 9)
should fall in the Moon Nakshatra or its trines.

64 Secrets o(Birth Time Rectification
2) The Navamsa-Navamsa longitude of Lagna (Lagna
longitude x 81) should fall in the Moon Nakshatra or its
trines.
3) The Dwadasamsa longitude ofLagna (Lagna longitude x
12) should fall in the Moon Nakshatra or its trines.
4) The Navamsa-Dwadasamsa longitude of Lagna (Lagna
longitude x 108) should fall in the Moon Nakshatra or its
trines.
Out of these four if two or more statements becomes true,
then given BT ·can be accepted as correct. If not make
necessary adjustments in the given BT to make this happen.
